case_title: EDGARD, BRIAN G. vs. CALIFORNIA MINI BUSING INC., DBA DOOR TO DOOR

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EDGARD, BRIAN G. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA MINI BUSING INC., DBA DOOR TO DOOR AIRPORT EXPRESS $899.69 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $979.69
